shipping.preview: Temu | Shipping InfoShipping optionsYou may choose standard shipping, express shipping or Click & Collect depending on the items in your order and your location. As your orders may be handed over to local carriers for the final leg of delivery, tracking may not be available every step of the way.Shipping addressPlease make sure that you have provided the correct and current address for shipping and delivery. You may use P.O. boxes as your shipping address. But certain items can only be delivered to physical addresses. Large products, valuables, perishables, products with age-based restrictions, or items shipped via private carriers may require a physical mailing address or signature confirmation to be successfully delivered. shipping.summary: Items cannot be delivered to security-restricted areas such as military bases.Shipping time and costAfter an order has been successfully paid and confirmed, you will see the delivery time and cost for shipping on your order confirmation page.

tax.summary: The original shipping fee and import tax are not refundable if your return is not a result of Temu's or the seller's fault.

fee.summary: The insurance costs, if any, are also non-refundable.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.

update_payload.shipping_guide: Items cannot be delivered to security-restricted areas such as military bases.Shipping time and costAfter an order has been successfully paid and confirmed, you will see the delivery time and cost for shipping on your order confirmation page.
update_payload.tax_guide: The original shipping fee and import tax are not refundable if your return is not a result of Temu's or the seller's fault.
update_payload.fee_guide: The insurance costs, if any, are also non-refundable.
